intro.title_english: Can you tell me about yourself?

sentences.english: Let’s get started with the interview.
Can you tell me about yourself?
My name is Peter and I am in my mid  forties.
I am average height and wear glasses.
I majored in electrical engineering when I was in university.

sentences.korean: 나는 결혼 했으며, 아들과 딸이 있습니다.
sentences.english: I am married and have son and daughter.
My son is sixteen years old and my daughter is nineteen years old.

sentences.korean: 나의 성격에 대해서 말하자면, 나는 외향적이고 긍정적인 태도를 가진 사람입니다.
sentences.english: As for my personality, I’m an outgoing person who has a positive attitude.
In my free time, I like to watch movies.

sentences.korean: 그래서, 나는 영화를 위한 특별한 방이 있습니다.
sentences.english: So, I have special room for movies.

sentences.korean: 이 장소는 또한 나의 가족 엔터테인먼트 공간입니다.
sentences.english: This place is also my family entertainment space.

sentences.korean: 그리고, 나는 오토바이를 운전하는 것을 좋아합니다.
sentences.english: And I like to drive motorcycle.

sentences.korean: 때때로, 좋은 날 때 나는 오토바이를 시외로 드라이브 합니다.
sentences.english: Sometimes, when it’s fine day, I drive the motorcycle in the countryside.

sentences.korean: 비록 나는 일 때문에 많은 여유시간은 없지만, 나는 지금 만족합니다.
sentences.english: Although I  don’t have a lot of free times due to work, but I am satisfied now.
